name: In Chicago, do I need witnesses for a case about AI demoting lawyer searches?

mainEntity.name: In Chicago, do I need witnesses for a case about AI demoting lawyer searches?

acceptedAnswer.description: Witnesses help prove harm (e.g., lost clients), but not essential if docs suffice; AI bias needs experts.[1] Key factors: causation chain, expert testimony.[3] Line up client affiants, SEO witness, avoid AI 'witness'.[1] Bolsters weak paper trail.
